description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check style that runs on push to all branches except gh-readonly-queue/** and master, on pull requests, and on merge groups. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, prepares the Linux environment, caches Rust dependencies, and then performs various style checks including ClangFormat, Shellcheck, shfmt, Pylint, and custom scripts for header guards, unused headers, standard header includes, absolute includes, config variables, command and setting exports, log error format, language validation, and map checks.
